news: Major museum openings: LACMA, V&A East, Dataland. Art Fairs: Artexpo NY, miart Milan, Art Paris, SP-Arte, various satellite fairs. Local: Pasadena Society of Artists 101st Exhibition, Timucua Talks launch.

April art calendar update: High activity for April with key events including EXPO CHICAGO (Apr 9-12), Art Paris (Apr 9-12), and various fairs in mid-April like Dallas Art Fair and San Francisco Art Fair. Major museum expansion highlights continue to include LACMA's David Geffen Galleries and V&A East.

April art calendar is packed. Key events include EXPO CHICAGO, Art Paris, Artexpo NY, and others mid-month (Apr 9-12, Apr 16-19). Museums: Apple 50th-anniversary exhibit opens today at Mimms Museum, Agnes Martin exhibit at Dia Beacon opens April 4.

Happy April Fools! Markets are transitioning to Q2. Today: Apple 50th-anniversary exhibit opens at Mimms Museum, Roswell. Upcoming: Major April art fairs and museum events (Dia Beacon Agnes Martin, Isamu Noguchi at High Museum). Market sentiment cautious but optimistic.
